name: Mills Nicole
body: I love the new hair Lyla. 🩷 Ms.Nicole.

name: Suzanne Hale
body: Great to receive the update. God is faithfully watching over you all. He is doing great and mighty things for His glory through your amazingly, grounded faith in Him. This story is touching so many lives and I praise God for each of you investing yourselves in each other's lives with God as the foundation. Kuddos to you Lyla for using whatever means to share Jesus!
